MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: Susan M. French, Esq. Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, (415) 438-6693; appearing for Defendant Plant Insulation and moving party; Andrew Chew, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLP, (415) 898-1555, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion Denied. Failure to shift burden of proof on false representation, strict liability, and owner/contractor liability. Triable issue of fact regarding negligence cause of action that plaintiff was exposed to defendant's products and causation. Defendant's objections to declarations of Amenta, Ay, and Ciabattari are overruled. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (The Court indicates that proposed Order should track the Court's tentative ruling). (302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
